description: Every ticket, fan, and pound of revenue from your DICE events — queryable, exportable, and joinable across shows.

novel_features.name: Door List with Transfer Resolution
novel_features.description: Generate a valid-ticket-holder list for any event, with transferred tickets showing the new holder's name — ready for door access management.

novel_features.name: Revenue Summary
novel_features.description: Aggregate gross revenue, Dice fees, and net earnings per event or across a date range — ready for CFO reports.

novel_features.name: Ticket Velocity
novel_features.description: Show cumulative ticket sales by day or hour relative to the on-sale date — see whether an event is tracking fast or slow.

novel_features.name: Cross-Event Repeat Buyer Report
novel_features.description: Find fans who bought tickets to two or more of your events — your most loyal audience, ready for VIP outreach.

novel_features.name: Opt-In Fan List with Geography Filter
novel_features.description: Export opted-in fan contacts filtered by city or country — CSV ready for Mailchimp, no dashboard exports needed.

novel_features.name: Return Rate Anomaly Report
novel_features.description: Flag events with unusually high refund rates — a pricing or marketing signal that deserves immediate attention.

novel_features.name: Top Spenders
novel_features.description: Rank ticket buyers by total spend for an event or across all events — your VIP list for comps, upgrades, and sponsor decks.

novel_features.name: Cross-Event Capacity Headroom
novel_features.description: Roll up sold-vs-capacity headroom across every event from the local store — see which shows have room and which are nearly sold out.

novel_features.name: Per-Pool Allocation Breakdown
novel_features.description: Break down each event's ticket-pool allocations (pool-sum vs event total) from the local store — spot mis-allocated or over-subscribed pools.

novel_features.name: Price-Tier Performance
novel_features.description: Rank price tiers by redemptions and each tier's share of total sales from the local store — see which tiers actually move.

novel_features.name: Entity Normalization
novel_features.description: Canonicalize free-text ticket-type and venue names into structured axes in a parallel, re-runnable local store — raw data untouched, mappings stay on your machine.

novel_features.name: Normalized Entity Stats
novel_features.description: Show normalized entity counts per axis from the local attribute tables — verify coverage before grouping reports by axis.

novel_features.name: Normalization Recommender
novel_features.description: Profile the local store and emit a starter normalization config — a ready-to-edit recommendation of which entities and shapes to wire.
